ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date and time of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date and time of arrival */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "plane_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the departure and arrival airports */,
  "terminal_number" TEXT /* Terminal number at the departure and arrival airports */,
  "actual_departure_date" TEXT /* Actual time the flight departed */,
  "actual_arrival_date" TEXT /* Actual time the flight arrived */,
  "load_factor" REAL /* Percentage of the flight's capacity that is occupied by passengers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_plane_id FOREIGN KEY ("plane_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("plane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Total number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the destination */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code of the destination */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the destination */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the destination */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the destination */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport above sea level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "plane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline owning the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" TEXT /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current status of the aircraft's maintenance */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft in liters */,
  "cruise_speed" REAL /* Cruise speed of the aircraft in km/h */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points accumulated by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_passengers" (
  "flight_passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight-passenger relationship */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger boarded the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "baggage_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the passenger's baggage */,
  "checked_in" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger has checked in */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger checked in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_passengers_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_passengers_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "repetition_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the flight's repetition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the schedule was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., takeoff, landing, delay) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person reporting the event */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the event */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the event */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the aircraft at the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., flight operations, customer service, management) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource being accessed (e.g., flight, passenger, aircraft) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "plane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, major overhaul) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person performing the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance activity in hours */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_maintenance_plane_id FOREIGN KEY ("plane_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("plane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay (e.g., weather, technical issues) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person reporting the delay */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the delay was resolved */,
  "estimated_departure_date" TEXT /* Estimated departure time of the delayed flight */,
  "estimated_arrival_date" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the delayed flight */,
  "affected_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers affected by the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
